chunks.title: Laws on Hebrew Slaves
chunks.reason: Covers regulations for male and female Hebrew servants.

chunks.title: Laws on Personal Injury
chunks.reason: Details penalties for death, injury, and cursing parents.

chunks.title: Laws on Contention and Servants
chunks.reason: Addresses disputes, pregnancy injuries, and slave treatment.

chunks.title: Laws on Oxen and Pits
chunks.reason: Outlines liability for goring oxen and uncovered pits.
